summary: RC-06 E2E validation via GUI only (Playwright, no APIs). Tested 4 profiles: MASTER, GERENTE, SUPERVISOR MECÂNICO, PCM. All logins succeeded; all sidebar visibility rules respected; all RBAC restrictions render 'Acesso Restrito' correctly on forbidden routes; Sair (logout) works for every profile. Navigation, KPIs, Kanban, Prontuário, Nova OS modal, Estoque, Paradas, Auditoria all render with real data. No blocking defects found. Only cosmetic/UX observations captured (see frontend_issues).

ui_bugs.issue: Button labeled '+ NOVO ATIVO' (uppercase). Ok for UX, but note lowercase variants of similar labels elsewhere ('+ Nova Parada', '+ Novo Plano', '+ Nova Inspeção') → minor inconsistency in casing across CTA buttons.

List uses card layout (not tabular). Column 'TAG' is not a real column header — TAG is embedded inside each card. Fine for UX but the RC-06 spec mentioned 'TAG column'. Consider adding an explicit visible TAG label above the code (e.g. 'TAG: AV-01') for scanability.
Export icons (Excel/PDF) next to the page title are icon-only with no visible text label and no title/aria-label detected via text selectors. Users may miss the export affordance.
ui_bugs.selector: svg icons next to h1 'Ordens de Serviço'

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking an OS card did not navigate to a detail URL (URL stayed at /os or /ordens-servico) in Gerente/Supervisor sessions. Detail may open in a side-panel/modal but URL does not update → breaks deep-linking and browser Back behavior.
Clicking an ativo card in Gerente session kept URL at /ativos (detail may render as drawer). Same deep-linking concern.

issues: Empresa autocomplete dropdown appears only after user types AND when filteredOrgs>0; if organizations API is still loading on first keystroke, dropdown looks broken. Consider a small loading spinner inside the empresa combobox until orgs are hydrated.

Section header 'PCM' shown in Supervisor sidebar for the 'Biblioteca' item can be confusing since Supervisor is not a PCM role. Suggest renaming the section or hiding it when the only child (Biblioteca) is not shown to that role.
Message wording is clear ('Seu perfil (Gerente) não possui permissão para acessar esta página.') and includes a 'VOLTAR' button — no complaints.

flows_ok: OS Kanban (Solicitadas 6, Em Análise 3, Aguard.Aprov 1, Programadas 11)

PCM.templates_route: '/admin/templates' resolves to Planos de Inspeção page (no 404, PCM has access).

click_and_timing_notes.note_on_timings: All measured page transitions completed within the forced 3s wait_for_timeout used in the script. Real load time is dominated by that wait (audit page took +0.7s over the wait ~ actual load <1s). No genuine >3s slow pages observed.

action_items: OPTIONAL UX: Make OS-card and Ativo-card clicks push a real detail route (deep-linking) so browser Back works and users can share URLs.
OPTIONAL UX: Add visible label or tooltip to icon-only Export (Excel/PDF) buttons at top of OS/Ativos/Auditoria pages.
OPTIONAL UX: Show a loading indicator inside the Empresa combobox on the login screen while organizations are still being fetched — first keystroke can look unresponsive.
OPTIONAL UX: Section header 'PCM' shown in Supervisor sidebar is misleading — hide when its children are not visible or rename to 'Documentação'.
No BUG-level fixes required. RC-06 acceptance criteria met: all E2E flows complete via GUI, all RBAC restrictions correct, no button unresponsive, no field out-of-focus, no overlay blockers.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js login form (LoginPage): empresa autocomplete depends on organizations being loaded before user types; if loadOrganizations() hasn't resolved yet the dropdown silently renders empty (filteredOrgs.length===0 condition). Consider disabling the input or showing a spinner during load.
ProtectedRoute pattern with data-testid='access-restricted' is correctly wired for /admin/config, /admin/usuarios, /master/white-label — confirmed for Gerente & Supervisor.
Sidebar group labels ('PCM','ADMIN','INFRAESTRUTURA', etc.) are static — should be filtered out when the group has zero visible items for the current role (small polish).

Detail routes for OS and Ativo appear to render as overlays/drawers without changing the URL. Recommend switching to nested routes (e.g. /os/:id, /ativos/:id) to preserve browser navigation and shareability.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 profile flows executed end-to-end without blocking failures)

test_credentials: master@maintrix.com/master123, test.gerente@maintrix.com/ger123, test.sup.mec@maintrix.com/sup123, test.pcm@maintrix.com/pcm123 — all confirmed working via GUI login.
seed_data_creation: None. Nova OS and Novo Ativo modals were opened for inspection but forms were NOT submitted to avoid polluting the database. All test actions were read-only after login.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RC-06 GUI validation complete. All P0 functionality works via UI: login (empresa autocomplete → org-option → email/pwd → submit), sidebar RBAC (Gerente=5 items, Supervisor=broader, Master=full, PCM=full minus admin), Acesso Restrito page renders with data-testid='access-restricted' on forbidden routes for all non-admin roles, and Sair works. Two UX papercuts worth pursuing next round: (1) detail views (OS card, Ativo card) don't push routes — clicking them keeps URL at /os or /ativos, breaking Back and share; (2) icon-only export buttons need labels/tooltips. Nothing blocks completion of any flow — do NOT fix these unless explicitly requested since RC-06 says 'Corrigir APENAS defeitos que impeçam a conclusão do fluxo'.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no blocking bug identified in RC-06 pass. Two potentially confusing behaviors documented under frontend_issues.ui_bugs (deep-link on detail views) and design_issues (login empresa hint, sidebar group headers) are UX polish items, not defects.
